name: TBCSCAT Inc.
summary: TBCSCAT Inc. develops and sells IT solutions for beauty salons in Japan. The company's solutions include Sacla, a POS cash register customer management system for beauty salons; Salon Appli, a salon application; Mail Meister, an automatic manual mail delivery system; and Reservation Meister, a Web reservation system. Its solutions also comprise HairPota, a beauty salon search portal site; SBWEB for displaying medical record and reservation tables; and I-SCAP EX, an integrated strategy sales management system, as well as membership card issuance, enhanced security, and handwritten medical record system. In addition, the company offers finance and accounting services for SMEs. Further, it operates nursing homes with nursing care services. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Oyama, Japan.
